plugins.name: idea-to-deploy
plugins.description: Complete project lifecycle methodology for Claude Code — 20 skills + 7 specialized subagents. Product discovery (MoSCoW/RICE), planning, scaffolding, coding, testing, debugging, optimization, security audit (Red/Blue Team), dependency audit, safe DB migrations, deployment, production hardening, infrastructure-as-code, session context persistence, safety guardrails.
